metadata.description: Curated capability hub for full business operations — development, marketing, finance, delivery, and AI governance.

plugins.name: tm-ml
plugins.description: ML & AI: RAG tooling, experiments, MLOps

plugins.name: tm-edpa
plugins.description: EDPA governance: evidence-driven proportional allocation. Standalone: github.com/technomaton/edpa

plugins.name: tm-vuca
plugins.description: VUCA assessment: multi-agent skill evaluation framework based on Dawson/Lectica research

plugins.name: tm-pmf
plugins.description: AI Product-Market Fit Playbook: opportunity scoring, product design, moat analysis, metrics, launch readiness, distribution, pricing, AI PRD — 60+ frameworks

plugins.name: tm-strategy
plugins.description: Integrated strategic assessment: orchestrates VUCA (HOW) + PMF (WHAT) + Wardley (WHERE) frameworks

plugins.name: tm-wardley
plugins.description: Wardley Mapping: value chain analysis, component evolution, strategic positioning, doctrine assessment, OWM map generation
